host.title: Server Host
host.description: The IP address the server listens on. Use '127.0.0.1' for local-only access or '0.0.0.0' to allow connections from any network interface.
host.warning: ⚠️ Never expose 0.0.0.0 to the internet without authentication!

port.title: Server Port
port.description: The TCP port for the web interface and REST API. Default is 8088.

bridge_address.title: Bridge Address
bridge_address.description: Internal TCP address for Lifeboat communication (hot-swapping updates). Default: localhost:8089

oauth_redirect_base_url.title: OAuth Redirect Base URL
oauth_redirect_base_url.description: Override the OAuth2 callback base URL. Leave empty for auto-detection. Required when Google/other providers reject your server's IP. Set to 'http://localhost:PORT' and register the same URL in your OAuth app settings (e.g. Google Cloud Console).

enabled.title: Enable HTTPS
enabled.description: Enables HTTPS via Let's Encrypt (auto-renewal). Also redirects external HTTP traffic to HTTPS.

domain.title: Domain Name
domain.description: A public resolving domain (e.g. aurago.mydomain.com). Port 80 and 443 must be forwarded to AuraGo.
domain.warning: ⚠️ Let's Encrypt will fail if Port 80 is not reachable from the internet.

email.title: Admin Email
email.description: Required by Let's Encrypt for important expiry notifications.

https_port.title: HTTPS Port
https_port.description: Port for HTTPS traffic. Default: 443. Only change if you use a reverse proxy with port forwarding.

http_port.title: HTTP Port
http_port.description: Port for HTTP redirect to HTTPS. Default: 80. Let's Encrypt requires this to be reachable from the internet.

behind_proxy.title: Behind Reverse Proxy
behind_proxy.description: Trust X-Forwarded-* headers from upstream proxies. Enable when using Nginx, Caddy, or Cloudflare.

provider.title: LLM Provider
provider.description: Select a provider from the provider management. Model, URL and API key are taken from the provider entry.

helper_enabled.title: Enable Helper LLM
helper_enabled.description: Enables the dedicated Helper LLM for internal analysis and background tasks. If disabled, many dependent helper features will not work fully.
helper_enabled.warning: Recommended: enable this with a smaller, cost-efficient model so AuraGo can use its full helper feature set.

helper_provider.title: Helper LLM Provider
helper_provider.description: Select the provider entry used for internal helper tasks such as analysis, summaries and background processing. This is separate from the Guardian model.

helper_model.title: Helper LLM Model
helper_model.description: Optional model override for the Helper LLM. Leave empty to use the provider default.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness in responses. Lower (0.1-0.3) = more deterministic, Higher (0.8-1.2) = more creative. Default: 0.7

use_native_functions.title: Native Function Calling
use_native_functions.description: Uses the LLM's native tool calling capability. Only enable if your model supports this (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini).
use_native_functions.warning: ⚠️ Free-tier models often do NOT support this!

structured_outputs.title: Structured Outputs
structured_outputs.description: Enables strict mode for tool calls with constrained output formats.
structured_outputs.warning: ⚠️ Only for models that support this (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini)!

provider.title: Embeddings Provider
provider.description: Provider for vector embeddings. 'disabled' turns off long-term memory. 'internal' uses the main LLM.

internal_model.title: Internal Model
internal_model.description: Model name when using internal provider for embeddings.

external_url.title: External URL
external_url.description: URL for external embeddings provider (e.g., Ollama at http://localhost:11434/v1)

system_language.title: System Language
system_language.description: Primary language for agent responses and system prompts.

core_personality.title: Core Personality
core_personality.description: Base personality profile affecting tone and communication style. Advanced profiles in prompts/personalities/*.md can also define meta blocks like anchor_traits, decay_resistance, and thresholds.

personality_engine.title: Personality Engine V1
personality_engine.description: Enables mood tracking and micro-traits. Automatically enabled when V2 is active.

personality_engine_v2.title: Personality Engine V2
personality_engine_v2.description: Advanced engine with LLM-based mood analysis and dynamic adaptation.

max_tool_calls.title: Max Tool Calls
max_tool_calls.description: Maximum consecutive tool calls per request. Prevents runaway loops. Default: 12

memory_compression_char_limit.title: Memory Compression Limit
memory_compression_char_limit.description: Character threshold for compressing older messages. Default: 50000

adaptive_system_prompt_token_budget.title: Adaptive System Prompt Budget
adaptive_system_prompt_token_budget.description: Automatically adds a small token budget surcharge for enabled tools and integrations so the system prompt can grow with the configured capability set.

core_memory_max_entries.title: Core Memory Max Entries
core_memory_max_entries.description: Maximum number of permanent core facts. 0 = unlimited. Default: 200

allow_shell.title: Allow Shell Execution
allow_shell.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows the agent to execute shell commands.
allow_shell.warning: Disable for maximum security in shared environments.

allow_python.title: Allow Python Execution
allow_python.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows the agent to execute Python code and skills.

allow_filesystem_write.title: Allow Filesystem Write
allow_filesystem_write.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows write/delete operations on files.

allow_network_requests.title: Allow Network Requests
allow_network_requests.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows HTTP API requests to external services.

allow_remote_shell.title: Allow Remote Shell
allow_remote_shell.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows SSH remote execution on managed devices.

allow_self_update.title: Allow Self Update
allow_self_update.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows the agent to trigger automatic self-updates.

allow_mcp.title: Allow MCP Servers
allow_mcp.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows connections to external Model Context Protocol servers.
allow_mcp.warning: Only add trusted MCP servers - they can execute arbitrary code!

bot_token.title: Bot Token
bot_token.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Stored securely in vault.

telegram_user_id.title: Authorized User ID
telegram_user_id.description: Your Telegram numeric user ID. The bot will only respond to this user.

bot_token.title: Bot Token
bot_token.description: Discord bot token from the Developer Portal.

guild_id.title: Server ID (Guild)
guild_id.description: The Discord server ID where the bot operates.

watch_enabled.title: Enable Inbox Watch
watch_enabled.description: Automatically check for new emails and notify the agent.

url.title: Home Assistant URL
url.description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance (e.g., http://homeassistant.local:8123)

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: Long-lived access token from your HA profile. Stored in vault.

enabled.title: Enable Uptime Kuma
enabled.description: Activates the read-only Uptime Kuma integration so the agent can read monitor states from the official /metrics endpoint.

base_url.title: Base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your Uptime Kuma instance (e.g. https://uptime-kuma.local:3001). AuraGo automatically requests /metrics.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Uptime Kuma metrics API key. Stored securely in the encrypted vault and never written to config.yaml.

insecure_ssl.title: Allow Self-Signed TLS
insecure_ssl.description: Skip certificate verification for self-signed or internal certificates. Only use this in trusted homelab environments.

request_timeout.title: Request Timeout
request_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for fetching the metrics endpoint. Default: 15.

poll_interval_seconds.title: Poll Interval
poll_interval_seconds.description: How often AuraGo checks the metrics endpoint in the background for monitor transitions. Default: 30 seconds.

relay_to_agent.title: Notify Agent on Outage
relay_to_agent.description: When enabled, AuraGo wakes the agent exactly once for each UP→DOWN or DOWN→UP status transition.

relay_instruction.title: Outage Instruction
relay_instruction.description: Optional free-form instruction that is included in every relayed Uptime Kuma transition event so the agent knows how to react.

enabled.title: Enable Homepage Tool
enabled.description: Activates the Docker-based web development environment. Requires Docker integration to be enabled.

allow_deploy.title: Allow Deployment
allow_deploy.description: Permits the agent to upload built websites to a remote server via SFTP/SCP.

allow_container_management.title: Allow Container Management
allow_container_management.description: Permits the agent to start, stop, rebuild, and destroy the development container.

deploy_host.title: Deploy Host
deploy_host.description: Hostname or IP of the remote web server for deployment.

deploy_port.title: Deploy Port
deploy_port.description: SSH port of the remote server. Default: 22.

deploy_user.title: Deploy Username
deploy_user.description: SSH username for connecting to the deploy server.

deploy_path.title: Remote Path
deploy_path.description: Absolute path on the remote server where the website files will be uploaded (e.g. /var/www/html).

deploy_method.title: Deploy Method
deploy_method.description: Transfer method: SFTP (default, recommended) or SCP.

webserver_enabled.title: Enable Local Web Server
webserver_enabled.description: Starts a Caddy web server in Docker to preview and host websites locally. Supports automatic HTTPS when a domain is configured.

webserver_port.title: Web Server Port
webserver_port.description: Port for the local Caddy web server. Default: 8080.

webserver_domain.title: Web Server Domain
webserver_domain.description: Optional domain for the local web server. When set, Caddy will automatically provision HTTPS via Let's Encrypt.

workspace_path.title: Workspace Path
workspace_path.description: Local directory path where web projects are stored and mounted into the Docker container.

circuit_breaker_max_calls.title: Circuit Breaker Max Calls
circuit_breaker_max_calls.description: Sets a separate tool call limit when the Homepage tool is active. Complex web workflows (init → build → test → deploy) often exceed the default circuit breaker. This higher limit applies temporarily from the first Homepage tool call until the end of the current action chain. Default: 35, max: 100

allow_temporary_token_budget_overflow.title: Allow Temporary Token Budget Overflow
allow_temporary_token_budget_overflow.description: Temporarily raises the system prompt token budget for homepage action chains. The increased budget scales relative to the homepage-specific circuit breaker max calls and only applies while the homepage workflow remains active.

enabled.title: Enable Netlify Integration
enabled.description: Activates Netlify site management, deployments, environment variables, forms, hooks, and SSL provisioning.

readonly.title: Read-Only Mode
readonly.description: When enabled, the agent can only read Netlify data. All create, update, delete, and deploy operations are blocked.

allow_deploy.title: Allow Deployments
allow_deploy.description: Permits the agent to deploy ZIP archives and roll back deploys on Netlify sites.

allow_site_management.title: Allow Site Management
allow_site_management.description: Permits the agent to create, update, and delete Netlify sites.

allow_env_management.title: Allow Environment Variable Management
allow_env_management.description: Permits the agent to create, update, and delete environment variables on Netlify sites.

default_site_id.title: Default Site ID
default_site_id.description: Optional Netlify site ID used when the agent does not specify one. Found in Site settings → General.

team_slug.title: Team Slug
team_slug.description: Optional Netlify team slug for API calls that require a team context (e.g. creating new sites).

enabled.title: Enable AdGuard Home Integration
enabled.description: Activates AdGuard Home DNS management — statistics, query log, filtering, DNS rewrites, blocked services, safe browsing, parental controls, DHCP, and client management.

readonly.title: Read-Only Mode
readonly.description: When enabled, the agent can only read AdGuard Home data. All write operations (toggle filtering, add rewrites, modify clients, etc.) are blocked.

url.title: AdGuard Home URL
url.description: Base URL of your AdGuard Home instance, e.g. http://192.168.1.1:3000. The API is accessed at /control/ on this URL.

username.title: Username
username.description: Username for AdGuard Home Basic Auth. Leave empty if authentication is disabled.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password for AdGuard Home Basic Auth. Stored securely in the vault under key 'adguard_password'.

host.title: Docker Host
host.description: Docker daemon address. Leave empty for local socket, or use tcp://host:port for remote.

enabled.title: Enable Remote Control
enabled.description: Activates the AuraGo Remote feature — manage remote devices via lightweight agent binaries.

read_only.title: Read-Only Mode
read_only.description: When enabled, file writes, deletions, and shell commands are blocked on all remote devices.

discovery_port.title: Discovery Port
discovery_port.description: UDP port for automatic network discovery. Remote clients broadcast on this port to find the supervisor. Default: 8092

auto_approve.title: Auto-Approve Devices
auto_approve.description: Automatically approve new devices when they connect. Disable to require manual approval in the UI.
auto_approve.warning: ⚠️ Only enable on trusted networks! Any device on the network can join automatically.

audit_log.title: Audit Log
audit_log.description: Log all remote control operations (commands, file access, revocations) for security auditing.

max_file_size_mb.title: Max File Size (MB)
max_file_size_mb.description: Maximum file size for remote file read/write operations. Default: 50 MB

allowed_paths.title: Allowed Paths
allowed_paths.description: Restrict file operations to these directories. One path per line. Leave empty to allow all paths.

enabled.title: Enable Budget Tracking
enabled.description: Track API costs and enforce spending limits.

daily_limit_usd.title: Daily Limit (USD)
daily_limit_usd.description: Maximum daily spending in US dollars.

enforcement.title: Enforcement Mode
enforcement.description: Action when budget is exceeded: warn = notification only, partial = limit expensive tools, full = block all requests

default_cost.title: Default Cost (per 1M tokens)
default_cost.description: Fallback input/output cost used when a model has no explicit pricing configured in its provider.

models.title: Model Costs (Legacy)
models.description: Model-specific costs are now configured per-provider in the Providers section. Existing entries here still work as fallback.

max_tool_calls.title: Max Tool Calls (Hard Limit)
max_tool_calls.description: Absolute maximum tool calls before aborting. Overrides agent.max_tool_calls if lower.

llm_timeout_seconds.title: LLM Timeout
llm_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait for LLM response before timeout. Default: 180

enabled.title: Enable File Indexing
enabled.description: Automatically index files in configured directories for RAG search.

directories.title: Index Directories
directories.description: List of directories to watch and index. Default: ['./knowledge']

poll_interval_seconds.title: Poll Interval
poll_interval_seconds.description: How often to check for file changes. Default: 60 seconds

enabled.title: Enable Maintenance
enabled.description: Run scheduled maintenance tasks (memory optimization, self-reflection).

time.title: Maintenance Time
time.description: Time of day for maintenance run (HH:MM format). Default: 04:00

lifeboat_enabled.title: Enable Lifeboat
lifeboat_enabled.description: Allow hot-swapping updates via the lifeboat companion binary.
lifeboat_enabled.warning: ⚠️ Allows the agent to modify its own code!

memory.title: Memory Tools
memory.description: Enable core memory management (save, recall facts)

web_scraper.title: Web Scraper
web_scraper.description: Enable fetching and scraping web content

wikipedia.title: Wikipedia Search
wikipedia.description: Summary mode sends Wikipedia content through the central Helper LLM for focused summarisation before returning to the agent

ddg_search.title: DuckDuckGo Search
ddg_search.description: Summary mode sends search results through the central Helper LLM for focused summarisation before returning to the agent

pdf_extractor.title: PDF Extractor
pdf_extractor.description: Extract text content from PDF files. Summary mode sends extracted text through the central Helper LLM for focused summarisation

agent_name.title: Agent Name
agent_name.description: Public agent name shown in the Agent Card.

agent_url.title: Agent URL (Override)
agent_url.description: Override the auto-detected agent URL. Use when behind a reverse proxy or on a custom domain.

base_path.title: Base Path
base_path.description: URL path prefix for A2A endpoints (default: /a2a).

client_enabled.title: Client Enabled
client_enabled.description: Enable the A2A client to connect to and communicate with remote A2A agents.

llm_provider.title: LLM Provider
llm_provider.description: Select which LLM provider to use for A2A tasks. Leave empty to use the main LLM.

port.title: Dedicated Port
port.description: Set to 0 to share the main web server port. Set a number to run A2A on a dedicated port.

server_enabled.title: Server Enabled
server_enabled.description: Expose this AuraGo instance as an A2A-compatible agent that other agents can communicate with via the A2A protocol.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable daemon skills globally.

global_rate_limit_secs.title: Global Rate Limit (seconds)
global_rate_limit_secs.description: Minimum seconds between daemon wake-up calls to the agent.

max_budget_per_hour.title: Max Budget Per Hour
max_budget_per_hour.description: Maximum LLM cost (in USD) that daemon wake-ups can consume per hour.

max_concurrent_daemons.title: Max Concurrent Daemons
max_concurrent_daemons.description: Maximum number of daemons that can run simultaneously.

max_wakeups_per_hour.title: Max Wakeups Per Hour
max_wakeups_per_hour.description: Maximum total agent wake-ups from all daemons per hour.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Maroto is a pure Go PDF library with no external dependencies. Gotenberg is a Docker service with full document conversion, screenshots, and office format support.

gotenberg_timeout.title: Gotenberg Timeout
gotenberg_timeout.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for document generation.

gotenberg_url.title: Gotenberg URL
gotenberg_url.description: Base URL of the Gotenberg service (e.g. http://gotenberg:3000).

output_dir.title: Output Directory
output_dir.description: Directory where generated documents are saved.

firewall.title: Firewall Check Interval
firewall.description: How often (in seconds) the guard mode checks for firewall rule edits to inform the agent.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enables the Fritz!Box integration. The agent can query system info, manage WLAN, read call lists, control Smart Home devices, and more.

host.title: Host
host.description: Hostname or IP address of your Fritz!Box (default: fritz.box).

https.title: Use HTTPS
https.description: Use HTTPS for TR-064 connections (recommended). Disable only if your Fritz!Box does not have a valid certificate.

password.title: Password
password.description: Fritz!Box login password. Stored securely in the encrypted vault.

port.title: TR-064 Port
port.description: TR-064 control port (default: 49000). Do not change unless you have a custom configuration.

username.title: Username
username.description: Fritz!Box login username. Leave empty to use the default admin account without a username.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enables the Jellyfin integration. The agent can browse libraries, search media, control playback, and manage your media server.

readonly.title: Read-Only Mode
readonly.description: In read-only mode, the agent can only view data. Playback control and library refresh are blocked.

allow_destructive.title: Allow Destructive
allow_destructive.description: Allows deleting media items from the Jellyfin server.

use_https.title: Use HTTPS
use_https.description: Uses HTTPS for the connection to the Jellyfin server.

insecure_ssl.title: Insecure SSL
insecure_ssl.description: Accepts self-signed or invalid certificates (for test environments only).

host.title: Host
host.description: Hostname or IP address of your Jellyfin server (e.g. jellyfin.local or 192.168.1.100).

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key for the Jellyfin API. Create one under Dashboard → API Keys in Jellyfin.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enables the Obsidian integration. The agent can read, create, search, and manage notes in your Obsidian vault via the Local REST API plugin.

readonly.title: Read-Only Mode
readonly.description: In read-only mode, the agent can only read notes and search. Creating, updating, and deleting notes is blocked.

allow_destructive.title: Allow Destructive
allow_destructive.description: Allows deleting notes from the Obsidian vault.

use_https.title: Use HTTPS
use_https.description: Uses HTTPS for the connection to Obsidian (default: true, recommended).

insecure_ssl.title: Insecure SSL
insecure_ssl.description: Accepts self-signed certificates from the Obsidian Local REST API plugin (default: true).

host.title: Host
host.description: Hostname or IP of the machine running Obsidian (default: 127.0.0.1).

port.title: Port
port.description: Port of the Obsidian Local REST API plugin (default: 27124).

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key from the Obsidian Local REST API plugin. Find it in Obsidian Settings → Local REST API.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable LLM-based pre-analysis of missions before execution.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Override the LLM provider for preparation analysis. Leave empty to use the main provider.

timeout_seconds.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time in seconds for a single preparation analysis.

max_essential_tools.title: Max Essential Tools
max_essential_tools.description: Maximum number of tools to include in the preparation analysis.

cache_expiry_hours.title: Cache Expiry (hours)
cache_expiry_hours.description: How long a preparation remains valid before it needs to be refreshed.

min_confidence.title: Min Confidence
min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence score (0-1) required for a preparation to be used.

auto_prepare_scheduled.title: Auto Prepare Scheduled
auto_prepare_scheduled.description: Automatically prepare scheduled missions when they are created or modified.

broker.title: Broker
broker.description: MQTT broker address in the format 'tcp://host:port' (e.g. 'tcp://localhost:1883') or 'ssl://host:port' for TLS.

buffer_max_messages.title: Buffer Max Messages
buffer_max_messages.description: Maximum number of messages to buffer. Oldest messages are discarded when the limit is reached. Default: 500.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Client ID for the broker connection. Default: 'aurago'. Must be unique per broker.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enables the MQTT integration. Allows the agent to publish, receive, and subscribe to MQTT messages.

qos.title: QoS
qos.description: Default Quality of Service level: 0 = at most once, 1 = at least once, 2 = exactly once.

read_only.title: Read Only
read_only.description: When enabled, the agent can only read MQTT messages but cannot publish, subscribe, or unsubscribe.

relay_to_agent.title: Relay To Agent
relay_to_agent.description: When enabled, incoming MQTT messages are relayed as context to the agent.

tls_ca_file.title: TLS CA File
tls_ca_file.description: Path to the CA certificate file for TLS verification (optional, for custom CAs).

tls_cert_file.title: TLS Cert File
tls_cert_file.description: Path to the client certificate file for mutual TLS authentication (optional).

tls_enabled.title: TLS Enabled
tls_enabled.description: Enable TLS/SSL encryption for the MQTT connection.

tls_insecure_skip_verify.title: TLS Skip Verify
tls_insecure_skip_verify.description: Skip TLS certificate verification. WARNING: Use only for testing with self-signed certificates.

tls_key_file.title: TLS Key File
tls_key_file.description: Path to the client private key file for mutual TLS authentication (optional).

topics.title: Topics
topics.description: Comma-separated list of topics to subscribe to on startup (e.g. 'home/#, sensors/temperature').

username.title: Username
username.description: Username for MQTT authentication (optional, depending on broker configuration).

allow_uploads.title: Allow Uploads
allow_uploads.description: Allow uploading new Python skill files.

auto_enable_clean.title: Auto Enable Clean
auto_enable_clean.description: Automatically enable skills that pass the security scan without warnings.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable the Skill Manager feature.

max_upload_size_mb.title: Max Upload Size (MB)
max_upload_size_mb.description: Maximum allowed file size for skill uploads in megabytes.

read_only.title: Read Only
read_only.description: When enabled, prevents all modifications to skills (no upload, delete, or toggle).

require_sandbox.title: Require Sandbox
require_sandbox.description: When enabled, skills can only be executed inside the sandboxed container environment. This prevents direct access to the system.

require_scan.title: Require Scan
require_scan.description: Run a security scan on uploaded skills before enabling them.

scan_with_guardian.title: Scan With Guardian
scan_with_guardian.description: Use the LLM Guardian to review uploaded skill code for security issues.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable the Telnyx integration for SMS and voice calls. The agent can send/receive SMS and make phone calls.

read_only.title: Read Only
read_only.description: When active, the agent can only receive messages but cannot send SMS or initiate calls.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your Telnyx API v2 key. Stored securely in the encrypted vault.

phone_number.title: Phone Number
phone_number.description: Your Telnyx phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +15551234567).

messaging_profile_id.title: Messaging Profile ID
messaging_profile_id.description: Telnyx Messaging Profile ID for sending SMS/MMS.

connection_id.title: Connection ID
connection_id.description: Telnyx Connection ID (TeXML App or Call Control App) for voice calls.

webhook_path.title: Webhook Path
webhook_path.description: URL path where Telnyx delivers webhook events. Must match your Telnyx portal settings.

allowed_numbers.title: Allowed Numbers
allowed_numbers.description: Comma-separated list of phone numbers (E.164) that may interact with the agent. Leave empty to allow all.

call_timeout.title: Call Timeout
call_timeout.description: Maximum call duration in seconds before automatic hangup (30–3600).

record_calls.title: Record Calls
record_calls.description: Automatically record all voice calls. Recordings are stored and accessible to the agent.

relay_to_agent.title: Relay To Agent
relay_to_agent.description: Forward incoming SMS and call transcriptions to the agent loop for processing.

allow_destructive.title: Allow Destructive
allow_destructive.description: Allows deleting datasets, snapshots, and rollback operations.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key for the TrueNAS API. Create one under System → API Keys in TrueNAS.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enables the TrueNAS integration. The agent can manage pools, datasets, snapshots, and shares.

host.title: Host
host.description: Hostname or IP address of your TrueNAS server (e.g. truenas.local or 192.168.1.100).

insecure_ssl.title: Insecure SSL
insecure_ssl.description: Accepts self-signed or invalid certificates (for test environments only).

readonly.title: Read-Only Mode
readonly.description: In read-only mode, the agent can only view data. All write operations are blocked.

use_https.title: Use HTTPS
use_https.description: Uses HTTPS for the connection to the TrueNAS server (recommended).

enabled.title: Enable Heartbeat
enabled.description: Periodically wakes the agent to check for open tasks, upcoming appointments, and new emails.

check_tasks.title: Check Open Tasks
check_tasks.description: Scans for open missions and to-dos during each heartbeat.

check_appointments.title: Check Appointments
check_appointments.description: Looks for upcoming calendar events and reminders during each heartbeat.

check_emails.title: Check Emails
check_emails.description: Monitors configured email accounts for new messages during each heartbeat.

additional_prompt.title: Additional Instructions
additional_prompt.description: Custom tasks or context you want the agent to consider on every heartbeat wake-up.

day_time_window.title: Day Time Window
day_time_window.description: Defines the daytime period with its own check interval.

night_time_window.title: Night Time Window
night_time_window.description: Defines the nighttime period with its own (usually longer) check interval.
